Class Review

java.lang.Object
application.Review
public class Review extends Object
Represents a review of an answer in the application. Encapsulates the details of a review, including its unique identifier, the ID of the answer being reviewed, the text content of the review, the author of the review, and the timestamp when the review was created. Review objects are used to store and retrieve review data from the database or to pass review information between application layers.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field

    The date and time when the review was created.

    The unique identifier for this review.
    private boolean
    isFlagged
    Boolean of whether a review is flagged or not
    private final String
    reviewText
    The textual content of the review.
    private final String
    writtenBy
    The name or identifier of the user who wrote the review.

  • Constructor Details

    • Review

      public Review(int id, int answerId, String reviewText, String writtenBy, boolean isFlagged, LocalDateTime createdAt)
      Constructs a new Review with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for the review
      answerId - the identifier of the answer being reviewed
      reviewText - the text content of the review
      writtenBy - the user who authored the review
      isFlagged - whether the review is flagged or not
      createdAt - the timestamp when the review was created
